---
pagetitle: "Fiction · Rabat Review of Books"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  id: fiction-listing
  contents: "posts/fiction/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, description, categories, reading-time]
  image-height: "220px"
---

```{=html}
<div class="rrb-container">
<div class="listing-page-title">
  <div class="eyebrow">◆ Department</div>
  <h1>Fiction</h1>
  <div class="dek">Short stories and novel excerpts — original fiction by contemporary writers.</div>
</div>
</div>
```

::: {#fiction-listing}
:::
